use_cases: Guiding new users through product features with step-by-step explanations
First-time setup experiences that introduce core functionality
Onboarding tours for SaaS dashboards and productivity tools
Welcome flows that showcase key value propositions
ai_summary: A polished multi-step onboarding dialog component featuring carousel-based navigation with smooth motion animations. Designed to welcome new users and guide them through product features with elegant slide transitions and visually appealing placeholder imagery. Implements AnimatePresence and embla-carousel for professional-grade UX during user onboarding flows.
